SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.util.utilitydesign

Class UtilitySystemDesigner

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.util.utilitydesign.UtilitySystemDesigner
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class UtilitySystemDesigner extends Object implements Serializable
Screening-level utility-system designer for oil & gas process flowsheets.

This class is an aggregator: it harvests the heating, cooling, shaft-power and instrument-air demands directly from a fully-run ProcessSystem (or every area of a ProcessModel) and sizes the supporting utility systems by reusing the existing NeqSim building blocks (CoolingWaterSystem and UtilityAirSystem). It then selects steam levels for the heating duties, splits the cooling duties between cooling water and air coolers, estimates fuel-gas demand for fired/steam duty and turbine drivers, and rolls up the resulting electrical load, fuel demand, CO2 emissions and operating cost.

The designer does not introduce any new process equipment classes. It is a read-only analysis layer intended for early-stage utility screening and as the deterministic core that an agentic optimisation loop can drive.

Typical usage: 

 UtilitySystemDesigner designer = UtilitySystemDesigner.fromProcessSystem(process);
 designer.setAnnualOperatingHours(8000.0);
 designer.setElectricityCostPerKWh(0.08);
 designer.design();
 String json = designer.toJson();
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:

    Class
    Description

    UtilitySystemDesigner.ShaftLoad
    A harvested rotating-equipment shaft load.

    UtilitySystemDesigner.SteamLevel
    A steam level available to satisfy process heating duty.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    UtilitySystemDesigner()
    Creates a designer with default offshore design-basis values and three default steam levels (HP, MP, LP).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    UtilitySystemDesigner
    design()
    Sizes all utility systems from the harvested demands and rolls up loads, fuel, emissions and cost.
    private void
    designCooling()
    Splits cooling demands between cooling water and air coolers, then sizes the cooling-water system by reusing CoolingWaterSystem.
    private void
    designFuelAndEmissions()
    Computes fuel-gas demand (steam raising, direct-fired duty and turbine drivers), the total electrical load, CO2 emissions and operating cost.
    private void
    designHeating()
    Allocates each heating demand to the lowest viable steam level, or to direct-fired duty when no steam level is hot enough.
    private void
    designInstrumentAir()
    Sizes the instrument-air system from the actuator count and base demand, reusing UtilityAirSystem.
    private void
    designShaftPower()
    Sums harvested rotating-equipment shaft power.
    static UtilitySystemDesigner
    fromProcessModel(ProcessModel model)
    Builds a designer and harvests utility demands from every area of a multi-area process model.
    static UtilitySystemDesigner
    fromProcessSystem(ProcessSystem process)
    Builds a designer and harvests utility demands from a single process system.
    int
    getActuatorCount()
    Returns the number of actuated valves harvested from the flowsheet.
    double
    getAirCoolerDutyKW()
    Returns the cooling duty allocated to air coolers.
    double
    getCoolingWaterDutyKW()
    Returns the cooling duty allocated to cooling water.
    double
    getCoolingWaterFlowM3h()
    Returns the sized cooling-water circulation rate.
    CoolingWaterSystem
    getCoolingWaterSystem()
    Returns the reused cooling-water sub-system (available after design()).
    double
    getFuelMassDemandKgh()
    Returns the total fuel-gas mass demand.
    double
    getFuelThermalDemandKW()
    Returns the total fuel-gas thermal demand.
    double
    getInstrumentAirCompressorKW()
    Returns the instrument-air compressor power.
    double
    getInstrumentAirDemandNm3h()
    Returns the instrument-air demand.
    UtilityAirSystem
    getInstrumentAirSystem()
    Returns the reused instrument-air sub-system (available after design()).
    double
    getTotalCo2TonnePerYear()
    Returns the total CO2 emissions of the utility systems.
    double
    getTotalCoolingDutyKW()
    Returns the total harvested cooling duty.
    double
    getTotalElectricalLoadKW()
    Returns the total electrical load of the utility systems and electrified drivers.
    double
    getTotalHeatingDutyKW()
    Returns the total harvested heating duty.
    double
    getTotalOpex()
    Returns the total operating cost of the utility systems.
    double
    getTotalShaftPowerKW()
    Returns the total harvested rotating-equipment shaft power.
    private void
    harvest(ProcessSystem process, String area)
    Harvests heating, cooling, shaft-power and actuator demands from one process system.
    private UtilitySystemDesigner.SteamLevel
    selectSteamLevel(double outletTempC)
    Selects the coldest steam level whose saturation temperature exceeds the demand outlet temperature by at least the minimum approach.
    void
    setAnnualOperatingHours(double value)
    Sets the annual operating hours used for fuel, emission and cost roll-ups.
    void
    setBoilerEfficiency(double value)
    Sets the boiler thermal efficiency used to convert steam duty to fuel demand.
    void
    setCarbonTaxPerTonne(double value)
    Sets the carbon tax applied to total CO2 emissions.

    setCo2GridFactorKgPerKWh(double value)
    Sets the CO2 emission factor for imported electricity.
    void
    setCoolingWaterCutoverTempC(double value)
    Sets the process cold-end outlet temperature below which cooling water is mandatory.
    void
    setCoolingWaterReturnTempC(double value)
    Sets the cooling-water return temperature.

    setCoolingWaterSupplyTempC(double value)
    Sets the cooling-water supply temperature.

    setElectricityCostPerKWh(double value)
    Sets the electricity cost.

    Sets whether rotating-equipment drivers are electric (true) or fuel-gas turbines (false).

    Sets the fuel-gas cost.

    setMinimumApproachTempC(double value)
    Sets the minimum approach temperature used for utility matching.

    setSteamLevels(List<UtilitySystemDesigner.SteamLevel> levels)
    Replaces the available steam levels.

    toJson()
    Serialises the utility-design results to pretty-printed JSON.

    toResultsMap()
    Builds a schema-versioned results map matching the utilities block of the task results.json schema.

    totalSteamDutyKW()
    Total duty allocated to steam across all levels [kW].

  • Constructor Details

    • UtilitySystemDesigner

      public UtilitySystemDesigner()
      Creates a designer with default offshore design-basis values and three default steam levels (HP, MP, LP).

  • Method Details

    • fromProcessSystem

      public static UtilitySystemDesigner fromProcessSystem(ProcessSystem process)
      Builds a designer and harvests utility demands from a single process system.
      Parameters:
      process - the fully-run process system to analyse; must not be null
      Returns:
      a designer with demands harvested (call design() to size utilities)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if process is null

    • fromProcessModel

      public static UtilitySystemDesigner fromProcessModel(ProcessModel model)
      Builds a designer and harvests utility demands from every area of a multi-area process model.
      Parameters:
      model - the fully-run process model to analyse; must not be null
      Returns:
      a designer with demands harvested from all areas (call design() to size utilities)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if model is null

    • harvest

      private void harvest(ProcessSystem process, String area)
      Harvests heating, cooling, shaft-power and actuator demands from one process system.
      Parameters:
      process - the process system to walk; must not be null
      area - the area label to tag harvested demands with (may be null)

    • design

      public UtilitySystemDesigner design()
      Sizes all utility systems from the harvested demands and rolls up loads, fuel, emissions and cost. Must be called after construction/harvesting and before reading any result getter.
      Returns:
      this designer, for chaining

    • designHeating

      private void designHeating()
      Allocates each heating demand to the lowest viable steam level, or to direct-fired duty when no steam level is hot enough.

    • selectSteamLevel

      private UtilitySystemDesigner.SteamLevel selectSteamLevel(double outletTempC)
      Selects the coldest steam level whose saturation temperature exceeds the demand outlet temperature by at least the minimum approach.
      Parameters:
      outletTempC - the process heating outlet temperature [°C]
      Returns:
      the selected steam level, or null if none is hot enough

    • designCooling

      private void designCooling()
      Splits cooling demands between cooling water and air coolers, then sizes the cooling-water system by reusing CoolingWaterSystem.

    • designInstrumentAir

      private void designInstrumentAir()
      Sizes the instrument-air system from the actuator count and base demand, reusing UtilityAirSystem.

    • designShaftPower

      private void designShaftPower()
      Sums harvested rotating-equipment shaft power.

    • designFuelAndEmissions

      private void designFuelAndEmissions()
      Computes fuel-gas demand (steam raising, direct-fired duty and turbine drivers), the total electrical load, CO2 emissions and operating cost.

    • totalSteamDutyKW

      private double totalSteamDutyKW()
      Total duty allocated to steam across all levels [kW].
      Returns:
      the total steam duty [kW]

    • validate

      public List<String> validate()
      Validates the harvested demand and design basis, returning a list of human-readable warnings.
      Returns:
      a list of warnings; empty if no issues were found

    • toResultsMap

      public Map<String,Object> toResultsMap()
      Builds a schema-versioned results map matching the utilities block of the task results.json schema.
      Returns:
      an ordered map of utility-design results

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serialises the utility-design results to pretty-printed JSON.
      Returns:
      a JSON string of the results map

    • setMinimumApproachTempC

      public void setMinimumApproachTempC(double value)
      Sets the minimum approach temperature used for utility matching.
      Parameters:
      value - the minimum approach temperature [°C]

    • setCoolingWaterSupplyTempC

      public void setCoolingWaterSupplyTempC(double value)
      Sets the cooling-water supply temperature.
      Parameters:
      value - the cooling-water supply temperature [°C]

    • setCoolingWaterReturnTempC

      public void setCoolingWaterReturnTempC(double value)
      Sets the cooling-water return temperature.
      Parameters:
      value - the cooling-water return temperature [°C]

    • setCoolingWaterCutoverTempC

      public void setCoolingWaterCutoverTempC(double value)
      Sets the process cold-end outlet temperature below which cooling water is mandatory.
      Parameters:
      value - the cooling-water cut-over temperature [°C]

    • setElectrifyDrivers

      public void setElectrifyDrivers(boolean value)
      Sets whether rotating-equipment drivers are electric (true) or fuel-gas turbines (false).
      Parameters:
      value - true for electric drivers, false for fuel-gas turbine drivers

    • setBoilerEfficiency

      public void setBoilerEfficiency(double value)
      Sets the boiler thermal efficiency used to convert steam duty to fuel demand.
      Parameters:
      value - the boiler thermal efficiency in the interval (0, 1]

    • setFuelLowHeatingValueMJperKg

      public void setFuelLowHeatingValueMJperKg(double value)
      Sets the fuel-gas lower heating value.
      Parameters:
      value - the lower heating value [MJ/kg]

    • setAnnualOperatingHours

      public void setAnnualOperatingHours(double value)
      Sets the annual operating hours used for fuel, emission and cost roll-ups.
      Parameters:
      value - the annual operating hours [hr/yr]

    • setElectricityCostPerKWh

      public void setElectricityCostPerKWh(double value)
      Sets the electricity cost.
      Parameters:
      value - the electricity cost [$/kWh]

    • setFuelGasCostPerKg

      public void setFuelGasCostPerKg(double value)
      Sets the fuel-gas cost.
      Parameters:
      value - the fuel-gas cost [$/kg]

    • setCo2GridFactorKgPerKWh

      public void setCo2GridFactorKgPerKWh(double value)
      Sets the CO2 emission factor for imported electricity.
      Parameters:
      value - the grid emission factor [kg CO2 / kWh]

    • setCarbonTaxPerTonne

      public void setCarbonTaxPerTonne(double value)
      Sets the carbon tax applied to total CO2 emissions.
      Parameters:
      value - the carbon tax [$/tonne CO2]

    • setSteamLevels

      public void setSteamLevels(List<UtilitySystemDesigner.SteamLevel> levels)
      Replaces the available steam levels.
      Parameters:
      levels - the steam levels to use; must not be null or empty
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if levels is null or empty

    • getTotalHeatingDutyKW

      public double getTotalHeatingDutyKW()
      Returns the total harvested heating duty.
      Returns:
      the total heating duty [kW]

    • getTotalCoolingDutyKW

      public double getTotalCoolingDutyKW()
      Returns the total harvested cooling duty.
      Returns:
      the total cooling duty [kW]

    • getTotalShaftPowerKW

      public double getTotalShaftPowerKW()
      Returns the total harvested rotating-equipment shaft power.
      Returns:
      the total shaft power [kW]

    • getCoolingWaterDutyKW

      public double getCoolingWaterDutyKW()
      Returns the cooling duty allocated to cooling water.
      Returns:
      the cooling-water duty [kW]

    • getAirCoolerDutyKW

      public double getAirCoolerDutyKW()
      Returns the cooling duty allocated to air coolers.
      Returns:
      the air-cooler duty [kW]

    • getCoolingWaterFlowM3h

      public double getCoolingWaterFlowM3h()
      Returns the sized cooling-water circulation rate.
      Returns:
      the cooling-water flow rate [m³/hr]

    • getInstrumentAirDemandNm3h

      public double getInstrumentAirDemandNm3h()
      Returns the instrument-air demand.
      Returns:
      the instrument-air demand [Nm³/hr]

    • getInstrumentAirCompressorKW

      public double getInstrumentAirCompressorKW()
      Returns the instrument-air compressor power.
      Returns:
      the instrument-air compressor power [kW]

    • getFuelThermalDemandKW

      public double getFuelThermalDemandKW()
      Returns the total fuel-gas thermal demand.
      Returns:
      the fuel-gas thermal demand [kW]

    • getFuelMassDemandKgh

      public double getFuelMassDemandKgh()
      Returns the total fuel-gas mass demand.
      Returns:
      the fuel-gas mass demand [kg/hr]

    • getTotalElectricalLoadKW

      public double getTotalElectricalLoadKW()
      Returns the total electrical load of the utility systems and electrified drivers.
      Returns:
      the total electrical load [kW]

    • getTotalCo2TonnePerYear

      public double getTotalCo2TonnePerYear()
      Returns the total CO2 emissions of the utility systems.
      Returns:
      the total CO2 emissions [tonne/yr]

    • getTotalOpex

      public double getTotalOpex()
      Returns the total operating cost of the utility systems.
      Returns:
      the total operating cost [$/yr]

    • getCoolingWaterSystem

      public CoolingWaterSystem getCoolingWaterSystem()
      Returns the reused cooling-water sub-system (available after design()).
      Returns:
      the cooling-water system, or null if not yet designed

    • getInstrumentAirSystem

      public UtilityAirSystem getInstrumentAirSystem()
      Returns the reused instrument-air sub-system (available after design()).
      Returns:
      the instrument-air system, or null if not designed or zero demand

    • getActuatorCount

      public int getActuatorCount()
      Returns the number of actuated valves harvested from the flowsheet.
      Returns:
      the actuator count
